incorrects.description: Student selected 6 — counted symbols instead of using the scale

steps.text: You counted the symbols. Check the key—each symbol stands for 5 students, not 1.

incorrects.description: Student selected 25 — multiplied symbols by scale but miscounted (5 symbols instead of 6)

steps.text: Let's think about this together. Count the Water symbols carefully—there are 6, not 5.

incorrects.description: Student selected 35 — multiplied symbols by scale but miscounted (7 symbols instead of 6)

steps.text: Here's a hint: count the Water symbols one more time. How many symbols do you see?

incorrects.description: Student answered incorrectly — system models the correct answer

params.description: Each Water symbol pulses sequentially while counting by 5s: 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30

steps.text: Let me show you. Water has 6 symbols. Each symbol equals 5 students. Count by 5s: 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30. The answer is 30.
